creator: emz@norma.perm.ru
text: Yup, but this particular PR is a duplicate either of https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=229958 (vice-versa) or of https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=226499. It's highly reproducible, like 1 of 5 zfs renames leads to lockup. I plan to schedule a maintenance time on our production site, reproduce this and get the procstat -kk of the zfs rename process that you requested in 226499.
